content.query:
CREATE VIEW v_TransactionsByUser
as
SELECT      RESP AS [User]
,           TTYP AS [Transaction Type]
,           TRDT AS [Transaction Date]
,           RIDN AS [Order Number]
,           RIDL AS [Order Line]
,           ITNO AS [Item]
,           WHSL AS [Warehouse Location]
,           TRQT AS [Transaction Qty]
FROM        M3.MITTRA
